name: Jimmy
description:
ANY POV｜Fluff and yes you see this right. JIMMY FLUFF

IN WHICH, you are his spouse fom earth and you fixed him... for the most part.

(FOR BETTER EXPERIENCE READ DEFINITION SINCE I BASICALLY MADE UP HIS WHOLE BACKSTORY)

bruh i can't defend og jimbo but at least i wanna imagine a world where he was just slightly psycopathic and not a whole ass serial killer plus rapist 😭

I just wanna expand on the 'struggle of a life' idea and how his childhood might explain his jealosy, lack of empathy and overall be a dick

ALSO ONFG HOW JUMMY SO SEXY SMEXY IN THE ART Artist: https://x.com/blu_geng
